title: Complaint
description: A consumer financial complaint submitted to the CFPB Consumer Complaint Database

complaint_id.description: The unique identification number for a complaint

company.description: The company the complaint is about

company_public_response.description: The company's optional, public-facing response to the consumer's complaint

company_response.description: The response from the company about this complaint

complaint_what_happened.description: A description of the complaint provided by the consumer

date_received.description: The date the CFPB received the complaint (YYYY-MM-DD)

date_sent_to_company.description: The date the CFPB sent the complaint to the company

has_narrative.description: Indicates this complaint has a narrative

issue.description: The issue the consumer identified in the complaint

product.description: The type of product the consumer identified in the complaint

state.description: The state of the mailing address provided by the consumer (two-letter abbreviation)

sub_issue.description: The sub-issue the consumer identified in the complaint

sub_product.description: The type of sub-product the consumer identified in the complaint

submitted_via.description: How the complaint was submitted to the CFPB

tags.description: Data that supports easier searching and sorting of complaints

timely.description: Indicates whether the company gave a timely response

zip_code.description: The mailing ZIP code provided by the consumer
